message:
🌱 Add fluent-bit: SIGSEGV while getting kubernetes metadata mission (#1805)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluent-bit-2508-sigsegv-while-getting-kubernetes-metadata",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluent-bit: SIGSEGV while getting kubernetes metadata",
+    "description": "SIGSEGV while getting kubernetes metadata. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current fluent-bit deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your fluent-bit version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nhelm list -n fluent-bit 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working fluent-bit installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluent-bit configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit\n```\nWe're running fluent-bit as a daemonset on kubernetes 1.18.6. Using either fluent-bit 1.5.4 or 1.5.3 the pods on some of the nodes go into a crush loop. Interestingly, pods on other nodes function correctly."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for SIGSEGV while getting kubernetes metadata",
+        "description": "Seems like the implementation of select define a limit about the maximum amount of fd to monitor. As the documentation recommend, we could use `poll` or `epoll`.\n\r\n\n----\n**Testing**\nBefore we can approve your change; please submit the following in a comment:\r\nI dont know how I could test it with a\n```yaml\nhttp: TLS handshake error from <ip>:<port>: EOF\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"SIGSEGV while getting kubernetes metadata\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Seems like the implementation of select define a limit about the maximum amount of fd to monitor. As the documentation recommend, we could use `poll` or `epoll`.\n\r\n\n----\n**Testing**\nBefore we can approve your change; please submit the following in a comment:\r\nI dont know how I could test it with a real kubernetes configuration, maybe some tips here ?\n\nFluent Bit is licensed under Apache 2.0,",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "http: TLS handshake error from <ip>:<port>: EOF",
+        "Fluent Bit v1.5.3\n* Copyright (C) 2019-2020 The Fluent Bit Authors\n* Copyright (C) 2015-2018 Treasure Data\n* Fluent Bit is a CNCF sub-project under the umbrella of Fluentd\n* https://fluentbit.io\n\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info] Configuration:\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info]  flush time     | 1.000000 seconds\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info]  grace          | 5 seconds\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info]  daemon         | 0\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info] ___________\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info]  inputs:\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info]      tail\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info]      systemd\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info] ___________\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info]  filters:\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info]      kubernetes.0\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info]      parser.1\n[2020/08/26 14:13:36] [ info] ___________\n[2020/",
+        "[2020/09/13 06:46:59] [ info] [filter:kubernetes:kubernetes.0] testing connectivity with API server...\n[engine] caught signal (SIGSEGV)\n#0  0x557e17c77275      in  flb_io_net_connect() at src/flb_io.c:349"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "fluent-bit",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "fluent-bit"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Daemonset",
+      "Node"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit/issues/2508",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit/pull/2948"
+    },
+    "reactions": 9,
+    "comments": 19,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
